_comment_1: AI Safe@Work v2 — xAPI LRS configuration template.
_comment_2: Closes DOCTRINE.md § Procurement-readiness gates → Gate 4 (xAPI buyer-handoff half).
_comment_3: Copy this template, fill the fields, and either (a) host as JSON your LMS can inject into window.AISW_XAPI_CONFIG before xapi-adapter.js loads, or (b) translate into URL params: ?lrs=ENDPOINT&auth=BASE64. The adapter accepts both.
_comment_4: Never check the filled version into a public repo — it contains an LRS bearer token or basic-auth credentials.
_csp_requirement: Add the LRS origin to connect-src in your page CSP. The default v2 CSP is `connect-src 'self'` and will block the POST until updated.
_validation_url: See .audit/integrations/xapi-statements-spec.md for the full statement catalogue and a step-by-step buyer validation procedure.
